channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: a2425b74-61f3-4bff-97cb-d0e3bc906777
Display name: Pure Storage Cloud VM Volume Group Mount Reader
Description: A special role for mount operation (e.g VM extension) only - enables to read connection endpoints.
Link: https://management.azure.com/a2425b74-61f3-4bff-97cb-d0e3bc906777?api-version=2022-04-01
